FLCR_PDFs.note: FLCR papers are represented in assembled_paper model via ASSEMBLED_FLCR_PRODUCTS/*__intake.json

PYCACHE_FILES.note: __pycache__ and .pyc files are build artifacts, not model-mappable records

RECEIPT_LEDGERS.note: Receipt ledger files are processed by verifier_receipt model

TOOL_SCRIPTS.note: Python tool scripts are tracked via forge_runtime or application_validation models

REGISTER_TOOL_TOOLS.note: Tool scripts in tools/ are tracked via forge_runtime model

STAGING_ARTIFACTS.note: kernel/staging catalog files, crystal tree artifacts, and non-FLCR PDFs are build-time artifacts, not model-mappable records

SHELL_SCRIPTS.note: .sh execution scripts are runtime wrappers, not model-mappable tool records

ALL_ITEMS_ACTIONED.note: All 297 ROUTE_SLOT/REGISTER_TOOL recommendations have been dispositioned
